dr_mechanism.intertwiner_norm: R*R = d(rho_3) = N_c, single isometry ||R|| = sqrt(N_c)
dr_mechanism.charged_leg: SU(2)_L broken mass channel = color-singlet condensate amplitude, large-N_c decay-constant scaling sqrt(N_c) (one intertwiner isometry): c = sqrt(N_c)/2
dr_mechanism.neutral_leg: U(1)_Y unbroken screening channel = vacuum-polarization loop closing the color line, dimension N_c: d = N_c/2
dr_mechanism.shared_half_weight: the 1/2 is the common current normalization; it cancels in every relative statement

verdict.loop_symmetric_law: not physically evaluated; outside only the legacy reference-error profile
verdict.leading_constant_proxy: outside the legacy reference-error profile; no physical exclusion follows
verdict.complete_archived_value_law: not a constant-c competitor and not excluded by this comparison
verdict.color_amplitude_loop_law: retrospective chart candidate; W/Z physical comparison not evaluable
verdict.remaining_rigorous_step: prove from the explicit collar-transport operators that the charged repair channel factors through a single intertwiner (amplitude, sqrt(N_c)) and the neutral through a closed loop (N_c); the current reconstruction fixes N_c and the DR intertwiner norms but does not emit those channel operators
